"Hello... I have nothing funny to say, please have this old talk that I don't care to rephrase."

HARD MODE REAL!?

...Well, this was originally a scrapped bot that was never released, but since that sans bot was the first to get to 100K messages, I decided to pick it back up and polish it before making it public. Also, as you can see, this is some of my much older art, so say hi to it!

Also also also also... No, I'm not making a Chara version... Nor am I likely to make more Undertale bots since I don't really care about it enough to do that.

Anyway, stupid tag stuff since this needs more general stuff to be found I think: Undertale Genocide, Genocide Route, Genocide Frisk, Frisk Genocide, No Mercy Route, Frisk Undertale, Undertale Frisk, yada yada... (I wonder if I should do these tags more often)
